title: Create Cobblestone deepslate generators
description: A datapack for the Create Cobblestone mod that adds deepslate generators.
body:
# Create Cobblestone deepslate generators
A datapack for the Create Cobblestone mod that adds deepslate generators.The Create Cobblestone mod does need to be installed!  

![Example setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F2XXc3ws/images/ff1b5bcec470a2ae6ee70f81625a1350e398c2b2.png)

## Installation
1. Download the [Create Cobblestone mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cobblestone).
2. Place the datapack in the world/server datapacks folder
3. Enable the generators in the config (if disabled)
4. If the world/server is already loaded, enable the datapack using commands. Else just start the server/join the world
